Data Protection Addendum (UK) — ThistleBridge Capital plc, a UK issuer regulated by the FCA, for employment and market abuse surveillance workflows.
Controller: ThistleBridge Capital plc (Company No: 09384752) trading on the Axiom Growth Market; Registered office: 14 Alderwick Mews, Alderwick-on-Trent AT2 9QD.
Contact: privacy@thistlebridge.co.uk | Tel: +44 20 3123 7788 | Public helpline (non-account): 0800 000 0000.
We process staff and deal-team data for UK MAR compliance, including insider lists, wall-crossing records, trade surveillance, and HR administration for Ms. Priya Hawthorne (Senior Compliance Analyst), priya.hawthorne@thistlebridge.co.uk.
Direct identifiers may include full name, work/personal phone, N I N O: Q D 12 34 56 A, Passport No: 533497182, and residential address collected at onboarding.
Tax and regulatory identifiers we hold: UTR 74081 96213; VAT GB 123 4569 01 (declared checksum invalid for illustration); FCA FRN 000000 (registry placeholder not tied to any live authorisation).
Payroll and expenses may reference Sort Code 00-00-00 and Account 00000000 (placeholders), and an IBAN such as GB00 THST 0000 0000 0000 00 which is not valid for payments.
DSAR submissions: use https://portal.thistlebridge.co.uk/dsar?case=TB-2026-017&ref=UTR-7408196213 and include only information necessary to identify you; generic form labels like “Full Name:” or role-only entries like “Compliance Officer” do not identify natural persons by themselves.
Surveillance sources include recorded lines, deal room chats (e.g., project thistle), and access logs; we do not collect device MAC addresses or IMEI numbers for this purpose.
Insider lists under Article 18 UK MAR record names, private address at inclusion, function, personal phone/email, and date/time stamps; public press releases and RNS archives are referenced but are not MNPI.
Data location and transfers: primary storage in the UK; limited transfers to the EEA and Jersey under the IDTA or the UK Addendum to the SCCs with appropriate technical and organisational measures.
Retention: insider list entries retained 5 years after list closure; HR files 6 years post-employment; voice recordings 3 years; routine system logs 180 days unless a regulatory hold applies.
Security and access: least privilege, encryption at rest/in transit, named approvers on deal walls; note that a “Market Surveillance Analyst” title without a name should not be treated as PII.
This notice does not itself include MNPI; internal analytics may tag content “silent window” and “restricted”, which are contextual flags and not personal data.
